p1e.interpretation: P1e treats benign housekeeping as ~0 (structural NESS), attacks elevated 7× (deviation from baseline)

p2.interpretation: P2 detects node-level asymmetry; both benign and attacks show flux, but attacks more pronounced

CredentialTheftLateral.interpretation: Credential-switch lateral movement clearly elevated on both P1e and P2

SmashAndGrab.interpretation: Fastest, most obvious attack; highest scores on both instruments. Sanity anchor.

SlowExfiltration.interpretation: Low-rate long-duration attacks; moderate scores (subtlety = harder to detect)

ServiceAccountHijack.interpretation: Single instance; lower P1e suggests break stayed within routine variation or early catch

LivingOffTheLand.interpretation: Crown-jewel test deferred; LOTL uses only actor's own edges in novel order/rate — critical for Phase 4/5

a_p1e_ignores_housekeeping.pre_registered: P1e treats hard negatives (ETL/backup/break-glass one-way benign) as ~0 housekeeping
a_p1e_ignores_housekeeping.rationale: Benign housekeeping is structural NESS (normal for ETL/backup); P1e treats as baseline, not anomaly.

b_p1e_catches_lotl.pre_registered: P1e catches LOTL (uses only actor's own edges, novel order/rate) via deviation from actor's baseline NESS
b_p1e_catches_lotl.rationale: LOTL requires balancing actor population and attack injection; 0 instances by chance. Requires larger Phase 4 sample.

c_p2_catches_sinks.pre_registered: P2 catches sink accumulation (exfil targets accumulate net inflow) via node-level divergence
c_p2_catches_sinks.rationale: Attacks create stronger source-sink structure (asymmetry) than benign one-way flows.

reasoning: P1e Cohen's d=0.87 (medium-to-large separation) — benign ≈ 0, attacks elevated
P2 Cohen's d=0.64 (medium separation) — both elevated, attacks 2.7× higher
Per-flavor patterns coherent: SmashAndGrab > CredentialTheft ≥ SlowExfil (easy to hard)
Two of three pre-registered predictions confirmed (LOTL deferred due to sample chance)
signal_assessment.consequence: Proceed to Phase 4 detector tuning. Physics signals are not flat; they show promise.

caveats: DEV-only sample: 5 worlds, ~11 campaigns. Exploratory only.
No LOTL instances: crown-jewel test untested in this batch.
No baseline comparison: B1 (Hopper) and other baselines evaluated in Phase 5.
Pre-registered defaults only: No tuning yet (window_size=80, alpha=1.0, P2 aggregation=L1).
Window-level aggregation: Phase 4 converts to instance-level detector output.
Synthetic landscape: No production drift, adaptation, or concept change.
Not a validation verdict: Phase 5 held-out evaluation and real-data shadow pilot are final gates.
